label: Chargebee
description: Connect to Chargebee to read and manage subscription billing, invoices, customers, and revenue data.

form.title: Connect Chargebee
form.subtitle: Paste your Chargebee API key and site name to give Anton access to your subscription billing data.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Chargebee live or test API key along with your site subdomain. No OAuth setup required — the simplest and fastest way to connect.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with a Chargebee API Key

Chargebee issues per-site API keys that you paste directly into Anton. No OAuth setup needed.

### Steps

1. Log in to your Chargebee dashboard at `https://<your-site>.chargebee.com`.
2. Click your site name in the top-right corner → **Settings**.
3. Navigate to **Configure Chargebee → API Keys & Webhooks → API Keys**.
4. Under **Full-Access Keys** (for full read/write) or **Read-Only Keys** (recommended for Anton), click **Add API Key**.
5. Give it a name like `Anton Integration` and confirm.
6. Copy the key that starts with `live_` (production) or `test_` (test site).
7. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below.
8. Enter your **Site Name** — this is the subdomain portion of your Chargebee URL (e.g. `mycompany` from `mycompany.chargebee.com`).

### Notes

- The API key is shown only once at creation time. Store it securely — if you lose it, generate a new one from the same page.
- Use a **Read-Only** key if you only need Anton to read billing data; this limits blast radius if the key is ever leaked.
- Test-site keys (prefixed `test_`) work against your Chargebee test environment and will not touch live data.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Your Chargebee Full-Access or Read-Only API key. Found under Settings → Configure Chargebee → API Keys & Webhooks → API Keys.

fields.name: site_name
fields.label: Site Name
fields.description: The subdomain of your Chargebee site. For example, if your dashboard is at mycompany.chargebee.com, enter mycompany.
